name: 前端诊断框架
summary: Unified 5-step diagnostic methodology for frontend issues: build failures, runtime errors, UI anomalies, and API/data problems.
description: Use when diagnosing frontend build failures, runtime errors, UI anomalies, API/data problems, white screens, request failures, or unexplained production exceptions; Chinese triggers include 调试, debug, 排查, 定位, 报错, 异常, 白屏, 请求失败.

boundaryWorkflows: Use a dependency upgrade workflow when the task goal is dependency migration, CVE remediation, lockfile risk review, or major version planning.
Keep ordinary build failures in the debug workflow first; collect evidence before deciding that dependency versions or package migration are the root cause.
